info.name: BabyeyiSystem API
info.description: Organized Postman collection for Babyeyi backend APIs. Uses session-cookie authentication (babyeyi_sid). **Parent portal:** use `10 - Parent Portal & Payments` → `POST .../parent-portal/login` (or register / phone-login) first; Postman stores the cookie for later requests. **Guest Babyeyi Finder pay (no login):** use `10b` — student code lookup + pricing + intent. **Public pay by school code + class (no auth):** use `10c` — `POST /api/public/public-pay/class-pricing` and `search-student`, then `POST /api/public/babyeyi-pay/intent`. **Invoices & receipts:** `12` — list/detail/print PDF (school session), public verify + paid receipt PDF, quote-balance, MoMo poll. **MTN direct (optional):** `13` — `/api/momo/*` and student-services pay. **Parent phone reset:** `14`. **Field agents:** `15`. **Super Admin only:** `admin-upgrades`, `admin-accounts`, and `/api/public/babyeyi-pay/admin-*` require `01 - Auth & Session` as SUPER_ADMIN. **School staff:** `POST /api/auth/login` with `email`, `password`, `schoolCode`. **Teacher Avance (USSD):** folder **`Teacher Avance USSD`** — login body uses collection var **`{{teacherStaffId}}`** (Manager → HR Central **Staff ID / Code**, same as `staff.staff_id` in DB, e.g. `TR-007`) as JSON field `identifier`; `ussdAccessToken` is set after login. **Shule Avance (HTTP):** see **`16`** → *Tools, services...* and **`18`** → *shuleAvanceServices.js* / *auth.js* / *shuleAvanceOrgPortal.js*.

item.name: POST /api/auth/login
item.description: School staff: set collection vars `email` (login email), `password`, `schoolCode`. Body uses `email`; API also accepts `identifier` with the same value.

item.name: 10b - Parent public Babyeyi Finder (no auth)
item.description:
**URL rule:** Set `baseUrl` to the API host **without** a trailing slash, e.g. `https://babyeyi.rw` or `http://localhost:5100`. Every request uses `{{baseUrl}}/api/...` (required slash before `api`). Wrong: `{{baseUrl}}api/...` → `https://babyeyi.rwapi/...` (broken).

**404 on parent-path calls:** Production must run latest `server.js` (parent portal router mounted **before** the `/api/parent-portal/public/babyeyi-finder` alias). If parent paths still 404, use the **alias** requests — same server handlers as `/api/public/...`.

item.name: 10c - Public pay by school code (no auth)
item.description: No login. Use **school directory code** + **class** to load tuition + requirements + total, or **search-student** (scoped to that school) then continue with **POST /api/public/babyeyi-pay/intent** using `next_step.example_body` from the response.

item.name: 12 - Invoices & Babyeyi Pay (extended)
item.description:
**Creating an invoice:** There is no separate “create invoice” endpoint. Invoices are created when you **POST /api/public/babyeyi-pay/intent** — the server inserts `babyeyi_payment_intents`, assigns `invoice_no`, and may start MTN MoMo or XentriPay. Use **10b** / **10** / **10c** intent requests for that.

**School staff (session):** `GET /invoices`, `.../detail`, `.../print.pdf`, exports — login via `01` + `POST /api/auth/login` first; cookie is sent automatically.

**Public (no auth):** `GET .../invoices/verify/:id?invoice_no=`, `GET .../receipt/:id.pdf?invoice_no=` (PAID only), `POST quote-balance`, `POST intent/:id/check-provider-status` (MoMo polling).

header.description: Optional; set XENTRIPAY_WEBHOOK_TOKEN in .env or use query ?token=

item.name: 13 - MTN MoMo direct & student services
item.description:
**MoMo:** Lower-level MTN Collection API (`momo_transactions` table). Production Babyeyi fees use **folder 12** intent flow instead. **Student services:** public catalog + quote + pay-momo for voucher-style services.

**Variables:** add `xentripayWebhookToken` at collection level if testing webhooks (optional).

item.name: 14 - Parent portal (phone recovery)
item.description: Password reset via phone flow. **Parent session** is used for `recovery-email` when logged in.

item.name: 15 - Field agents
item.description: Mounted at `/api/field-agents` (admin) and `/api/agent` (agent role). Login as AGENT or elevated role first.

request.description: Use variable **teacherStaffId** = the **Staff ID / Code** from Manager portal **HR Central** (`HRCentral.jsx`): auto-generated code stored as `staff.staff_id` (e.g. TR-007). It is sent in the JSON body as **identifier** (API also accepts `staff_code` alias).

item.name: 16 - BabyeyiPro portals API map
item.description: API endpoints actively consumed by babyeyipro frontend portals (manager, teacher, DOS, accountant, discipline, librarian, storekeeper). These resolve against `{{baseUrl}}/api`.

item.name: 17 - Extra backend modules (BabyeyiSystem)
item.description: Additional backend API groups mounted in `server.js` that were not fully represented in the earlier folders.

item.name: 18 - Exhaustive route-file index (remaining)
item.description: Second-pass full backend route-file coverage. Endpoints here are grouped by source module to make auditing easier.
